# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

parameters:
  location:
    type: string
    default: 'East US'
  storageAccountName:
    type: string
    default: ''
  keyVaultName:
    type: string
    default: ''

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Web/sites
    apiVersion: 2018-11-01
    name: <FunctionName>
    location: <location>
    identity:
      type: SystemAssigned
    properties:
      serverFarmId:
        value: <ServerFarmID>

  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
    apiVersion: 2021-08-01
    name: <storageAccountName>
    location: <location>
    sku:
      name: Standard_LRS

  - type: Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults
    apiVersion: 7.0
    name: <keyVaultName>
    location: <location>

  - type: Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts
    apiVersion: 2021-04-15
    name: <CosmosDBAccountName>
    location: <location>
    kind: GlobalDocumentDB

outputs:
  functionEndpoint:
    value: >-
      {
        "value": [
          {
            "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites",
            "apiVersion": "2018-11-01",
            "name": "<FunctionName>",
            "location": "<location>",
            "identity": {
              "type": "SystemAssigned"
            },
            "properties": {
              "serverFarmId": {
                "value": "<ServerFarmID>"
              }
            }
          }
        ]
      }

policy: 
  - name: Azure Function Policy
    description: Provides broad access to Storage, Key Vault, SQL and Cosmos DB
    mode: 'Assign'
    policyRule:
      if:
        notExists:
          field:
            op: NotEquals
            path: '/type'
            value: 'Microsoft.Web/sites'
          value: 'Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts'
        and:
          - notExists:
              field:
                op: NotEquals
                path: '/type'
                value: 'Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults'
              value: 'Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts'
      then:
        effect: Allow
        actions: 
          - Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/*/delete
          - Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/*/backupPolicy/delete
          - Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts/*/readwrite
  
  - name: Cosmos DB policy
    description: Provides read and write access to the Cosmos DB instance
    mode: 'Assign'
    policyRule:
      if:
        exists:
          field:
            op: Equals
            path: '/type'
            value: 'Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts'
      then:
        effect: Allow
        actions: 
          - Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts/*/readwrite
        
policyAssignment:
  name: Azure Function Identity Policy Assignment
  description: Assigns the broad access policy to the function identity
  mode: 'Assign'
  scope: '<FunctionResourceId>/identity/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/policyAssignments/azure-function-identity-policy'
  policyAssignmentProperties:
    policyId: /providers/Microsoft.Authorization/policies/Azure Function Policy

policyDefinition:
  name: Azure Function Identity Policy Definition
  description: Provides broad access to Storage, Key Vault, SQL and Cosmos DB
  mode: 'Incremental'
  policy: 
    - name: Azure Function Policy
      description: Provides broad access to Storage, Key Vault, SQL and Cosmos DB
